description: Stencil adds dist-custom-elements autoLoader support across compiler output, declarations, and wdio harness
rationale: The changed compiler output files, public compiler declarations, validation specs, and wdio fixtures all belong to one autoLoader feature rollout. They should remain one semantic unit even without direct patch-local call edges.
notes: Current engine reports error because feature implementation, declaration surface, validation tests, and e2e harness files are fragmented into many disconnected clusters.
